claims.headline: Supports cognitive function
claims.notesSentence: Hericium erinaceus improved cognition scores vs. placebo in adults with mild cognitive impairment over 16 weeks.

source.label: PubMed
source.linkTitle: Lion's Mane cognitive impairment trial on PubMed

claims.headline: Memory in older adults
claims.notesSentence: A 12-week trial in older adults reported improvements in cognitive-function scores after daily oral intake.

source.label: PubMed
source.linkTitle: Lion's Mane older adults cognition trial on PubMed
